mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, u.nickname AS publisher_name, u.avatar AS publisher_avatar FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, u.nickname AS publisher_name, u.avatar AS publisher_avatar FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND p.user_id != #{userId}
AND p.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT p2.category_id FROM user_favorite uf INNER JOIN product p2 ON p2.id = uf.product_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT p3.category_id FROM user_browse_log bl INNER JOIN product p3 ON p3.id = bl.product_id WHERE bl.user_id = #{userId} )
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
